rationale: Maine SOS-issued registration number for the original mark. Optional ('if known') because the SOS can look it up by name.

label_verbatim: B.1: TEXT - list word(s) protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of the original mark's text — same key as MARK_mark1, but here it RECITES the original (no amendments permitted).
Second line of the original mark's text.

label_verbatim: B.2: FEATURES - describe in detail the design protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: First line of the original design-features description.
Second line of the original design-features description.

Free-text type-of-mark (e.g., 'Trademark', 'Service Mark', 'Collective Mark'). Distinct from MARK_mark1's combined mark.type_and_class_number because this renewal form splits TYPE (here) and CLASS (D, indexed list of changes) into separate widgets.

label_verbatim: C: The type of mark indicated represents an amendment from that appearing on the original registration — yes
rationale: Mutually-exclusive boolean: 'yes' (true). Distinct from FEATURES/TEXT amendments which are not permitted on renewal.

label_verbatim: C: ...amendment from that appearing on the original registration — no
rationale: Mutually-exclusive boolean: 'no' (false).

First class-change row's class number. The form states 'Complete this section ONLY if you are adding new classes or deleting old classes' and 'Complete for each class affected' — implying multiple class changes, but the AcroForm widgets only support 1 inline row; further rows go on attached pages (mark.additional_pages_attached).

label_verbatim: D: For each NEW class added
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum: 'added'.
Mutually-exclusive enum: 'deleted'.

label_verbatim: D: DESCRIBE goods manufactured or sold and/or the service that is provided (line 1)
rationale: First line of the class-change goods/services description.
Second line of the class-change goods/services description.

label_verbatim: DESCRIBE manner in which mark is applied to the goods or used to promote their sale and/or the manner in which the mark is used in connection with the service (line 1)
rationale: First line of usage description — same key family as MARK_mark1.
Second line of usage description.
Boolean opt-in for any of the multi-line fields' overflow (text/features recital, class changes, usage).

label_verbatim: E. I, ___ (Print/Type Name and Capacity), believe
rationale: Signer printed name and capacity. Same key as MARK_mark1 — note this is mark.signer.* (not filing.signer.*) because the trademark statute (10 MRSA) defines its own signer-identity primitive separate from entity-formation forms.

label_verbatim: E: ___ ('Myself', Firm, Association or Corporate Name)
rationale: Mark owner's identity ('Myself' for an individual; firm/association/corporate name for an entity). Lives under mark.applicant.* (not entity.*) because trademark applicants may be individuals, unions, or associations not represented in entity.* — see schema-gaps/2026-04-30-phase2-summary.md.

label_verbatim: E: ___ (Mailing Address, City, State and Zip Code)
rationale: Mark owner's mailing address, single combined widget (street + city + state + zip in one blank). Same key as MARK_mark1.
Mutually-exclusive 'individual'.
Mutually-exclusive 'general_partnership'.
Mutually-exclusive 'limited_partnership'.
Mutually-exclusive 'corporation'. Widget is unnamed in the AcroForm; bound by rect (page 1, y≈422-439, x≈462-480).
Mutually-exclusive 'association'. Widget is unnamed in the AcroForm; bound by rect (page 1, y≈398-414, x≈68-85).
Mutually-exclusive 'union'.
Mutually-exclusive 'other' (requires mark.applicant.entity_type_other_explanation).
Free-text explanation when entity_type='other'.

label_verbatim: F: If a corporation, limited liability company or limited liability partnership, the jurisdiction (state) of incorporation/organization is
rationale: Home jurisdiction; required when entity_type implies a registered entity.

label_verbatim: F: ...and the date of incorporation/organization in its jurisdiction is
rationale: Date applicant entity was incorporated/organized in its home jurisdiction.
Date of the renewal application — universal filing.date_signed (matches MARK_mark1's mapping for the same field).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'. Widget is unnamed in the AcroForm; bound by rect (page 2, y≈607-628, x≈68-90). Equivalent to Check Box15 on most other forms.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Widget is unnamed in the AcroForm; bound by rect (page 2, y≈585-606, x≈68-90). Equivalent to Check Box16 on most other forms.
Total fees ($60 base + $10 per affected class per page-0 fee header, plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: trademark registrations don't have annual reports, but the cover letter is shared across SOS divisions. Same caveat as MARK_mark1.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
